policy.replan_rule: When repo structure changes, run `make writeback-apply WRITE=1` before continuing.

contract.purpose: HTTP handler dispatching requests to service layer
contract.invariants: No direct database access; all state through service interfaces
contract.verification: go test ./api/ passes; handler returns 400 on malformed input

contract.purpose: Request middleware chain — auth, logging, rate limiting
contract.invariants: Middleware order: auth before rate-limit before handler; never mutates request body
contract.verification: go test ./api/ covers unauthenticated and rate-limited scenarios

contract.purpose: Root React component — routing and global providers
contract.invariants: No business logic in this file; only layout and route definitions
contract.verification: npm test passes; app renders without console errors

contract.purpose: React hook wrapping API calls with loading/error state
contract.invariants: All API calls go through this hook; never fetch directly in components
contract.verification: Hook returns loading=true initially; errors populate error field

entries.notes: Stage: planned — interface defined, implementation pending

contract.purpose: Shared domain types used by both api and worker modules
contract.invariants: No imports from api/ or web/; only stdlib and shared/ imports allowed
contract.verification: go vet ./shared/ passes; no circular import detected

contract.purpose: Background job processor consuming from message queue
contract.invariants: Must be idempotent; duplicate messages must not cause side effects
contract.verification: go test ./worker/ covers duplicate and out-of-order delivery

contract.purpose: Local development environment — api, web, database, and queue services
contract.invariants: No production secrets; all credentials use default dev values
contract.verification: docker compose up starts all services; health checks pass within 30s

contract.purpose: Top-level build orchestration — build, test, lint, deploy targets per module
contract.invariants: Module-specific targets prefixed with module name (api-build, web-build); guardrails targets unprefixed
contract.verification: make help lists all targets; make test runs all module tests
